Semi Auto Rifles

Items

AR15s, AR10s & Hunting Rifles - 78 Semi-Auto Rifles

Semi-automatic rifles are a popular choice for home defense, tactical operations, and range shooting.  Enthusiasts enjoy customizing AR15s, AR10s, and even traditional semi-auto rifles.

Our line of 78 Semi-Auto Rifles includes Brownells own BRN line of rifles. Also, it contains semi-auto calibers like the 5.56x45 NATO, 22 Long Rifle, 9mm Luger, 7.62x51 NATO, 7.62x39mm and many others for hunting, target practice, tactical operations, and home defense.

Read the 4.6 Ratings out of 103 Reviews from verified buyers to help find the right semi-auto rifle to suit your needs and save Save Up To $90.00 on high-performance rifles. View all 389 Rifles at Brownells.
